name: cta-sections-01
title: CTA Sections
author: Toby Belhome
description: Craft compelling Tailwind CSS CTA sections that guide users toward your key actions. These designs combine minimalist layouts, clear messaging, and prominent buttons to drive conversions and engagement. Perfect for landing pages, product features, or promotional campaigns seeking a modern, high-impact call-to-action experience.
